title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
